hypotheses.statement: Next Shorts in birds, forests should outperform cold topics.
earth_engine is the strongest current story shape.
A clearer one-line follow CTA should improve subscribers per 1k views.
Turn top performers into sourced sequence/remake candidates before cold discovery.
Favor frame profile close_subject|feed_bright|high_contrast for stronger click and retention signals.

next_variants.title: The first feathers cue explains owls' payoff
The first rock layer cue explains rocks' payoff
The first exposed slope cue explains mountains' payoff
The first canopy cue explains forests' payoff

comment_prompts: Answer this viewer question: Watch the cool canopy again. Tomorrow in Hidden Network: another nature signal. Do forests feel more like places, systems, or living machines?
Answer this viewer question: Watch the rock layers again. Tomorrow in Earth Engine: another nature signal. Does this make Earth feel stable or constantly moving?
Answer this viewer question: Watch the silent wings again. Tomorrow in Watch The Cue: another animal signal. Is this adaptation, instinct, or intelligence?
Answer this viewer question: Watch the rock again. Tomorrow in Earth Engine: another animal signal. Does this make Earth feel stable or constantly moving?

visual_policy.rule: Favor the winning visual profile when available; otherwise keep selecting the highest local CTR score while collecting samples.

production_policy.selection_rule: highest autonomy_priority among non-rejected publish_score candidates
